name: Number 71: Rebarian Shark
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７１ リバリアン・シャーク
desc:
2 Level 3 monsters
Once per turn, if this card has material: You can target 1 "Number" Xyz Monster in your GY, except "Number 71: Rebarian Shark"; Special Summon it, and if you do, attach 1 material from this card to it. If this card is sent to the GY: You can place 1 "Rank-Up-Magic" Spell from your Deck on top of your Deck.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 3 monsters
Once per turn, if this card has material: You can target 1 "Number" Xyz Monster in your GY, except "Number 71: Rebarian Shark"; Special Summon it, and if you do, attach 1 material from this card to it. If this card is sent to the GY: You can place 1 "Rank-Up-Magic" Spell from your Deck on top of your Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
